originalTitle: Live RL Research on PufferLib w/ Joseph Suarez
title: Porting Muon Optimizer to C++ for PyTorch Backend
summary: Worked on porting the Muon optimizer from Python to C++ for inclusion in PyTorch's backend. Debugged compilation issues with torch build and serialization, while also reviewing a collaborator's PR for PufferLib sweep improvements and discussing Minigru architecture.
